Name: karen
Title: Great Meat substitute
Review: Really loved the kit .  Easy to use and tastes great . India is really coming on well with companies that make vegan convenience food . I would say that you don't need as much oil than in the instructions though . But I Love this brand and products.  My meat eating husband also always enjoys these meals.

Name: Rupali
Title: Taste like soya only
Review: Saw many reviews of YouTube and decided to give it a try to this unmutton keema, thought of it to be a little overpriced for the quantity. Easy to make. But the taste is just like having shredded soya chunks in a masala. Of course its made out of soya but the advertisements and the reviews i saw I thought it might not taste like soya, but it does. Being a hard core non vegetarian i was disappointed. Maybe i was expecting too much hehe.

Name: Technocrat
Title: This keema is tasty and so convenient.
Review: We loved this product to bits (pun intended)! I have enjoyed HoodDot products in the past and had high expectations. It didn’t disappoint. Has the richness of flavour and the bites texture that is eerily similar to a real good keema. I made it twice, and the second time at a potluck, my non-veg friends ate it without any mention other than it being tasty. They couldn’t believe when I told them this was vegan! Way to go guys.

Name: Leona
Title: The flavours are melting on my tongue!
Review: Tastes veryyyyy similar to meat but no cruelty involved!

Name: Amarnath Banerjee
Title: Too Many Spices !
Review:
The spices included with the pack must cost more than the plant-based keema !
Has the texture of mutton keema, but too rich in flavours, even if we use less than half of the mixed spices provided.

Name: Amazon Customer
Title: Soyabean scam
Review:
This is just soyabean same as other soyabean company. So this company selling soyabean in the name of mutton and chicken? Company thinks, we all indian customers are super fool and its easy to make us fool.
Company should have some shame for selling these lies in the name of artificial meat or vegan meat, why don't you guys just say it's a soyabean keema ?
Any explanation, on why the company Gooddot not saying this a soyabean?? We indians know and highly familiar with soyabean, so when you selling the soyabeans as a new name called vegan meat , then don't you think you guys (company) making fool of us ?
Never ever ever in life will buy any product named good dot.
Rename the company name from
GoodDot --> GoodLies

Name: Samayra
Title: Good product.
Review: Really good texture and excellent quality, value for money. Go for it.

Name: Sahil
Title: Worst product ever
Review:
The product came in a good box with all the ingredients and instruction but the masala packet inside had a black sauce which smelt and looked burnt. I anyways went ahead and cooked as per the instruction and the final product tasted awful. It was soo burnt in taste that we had to throw the entire thing. I have had soo many plant based products but this is by far the worst one.
PLEASE DONT GO ON TRYING THIS PRODUCT.
THE COMPANY SHOULD DO SOMETHING ABOUT IT.

Name: Vicky
Title: I liked it
Review: Damn I liked it!! It's quite tasty. One star less cause I've been commenting good dot to not make a bulk "teekha" masala! Please provide a separate chilli pack. So all can add according to taste. I prefer workout the chilli or without the hotness!! But overall I liked it

Title: Don't use too much oil
Review:
I used a lot of oil and spoiled the taste.

I am not sure how it would've tasted but just don't use a lot of oil.

But this one blew our minds! The aroma filled the house - and the taste was spot-on.

It's something that we've gotten used to and a couple of times a month we end up having this. With Pav, with parathas, even with rice.

I hope if they had, that person is still there in ICU.

Title: Better than mutton keema!
Review: This keema is plant-based, but several of my friends found it indistinguishable or even better than mutton keema! Of course, the simplicity and convenience makes it a breeze - you WILL feel like a Chef 😀. I have been recommending this to all my friends and relatives, and many have become fans :)

Title: Not at all worth it
Review:
To be honest, I looked at the reviews and was impressed.
Cooked it and was impressed by the Color and the texture.

But you will only enjoy first 2bites and post that it becomes little nauseating and oil is too intense.
Also, made all of us feel sick for next 48hours after having this.

Try it but unsure of the after effects. At your own risk sorta product. A good gimmick though.

Name: Krishna patil
Title: Amazing vegan meat ever
Review: This keema kit is truly amazing! I cooked this and even made a review video on my Youtube channel-FoodAttacQ . It tastes exactly like resturant and Irani cafe keema . You will definitely eat this again if you taste it once !

Title: Turned Vegetarian a month back and this Unmutton Keema is my reward.

For keema the preparation was super easy. I followed each step as mentioned on the pack. It literally tastes like Mutton. Only thing was that the aftertaste gave it away but a very good product nonetheless. I highly recommend it.

Name: Rakesh G
Title: Good product. Problem with Amazon's packaging process.
Review:
Taste was good. Got 9 pieces in one box and 10 in another. Little tough to take them out of the box, as pieces are cramply fitted. Use tongs to take out middle piece first.

Little confusion on date of manufacturing, as on the box, date printed was May, 2019 while on the sticker pasted by Amazon on the lid was showing Mfg date as May 2018. I considered Amazon's date as misprint. But Amazon should look into the matter, as there shouldn't be any compromise on quality when it comes to food. Taken out one star for this goofup.

Review:
Was a bit skeptical to buy this since I’ve never ordered food online because I live in a remote area, but this came well packaged in 2 days and it’s mfd was March 2020. The quality amazed me!! It was extremely soft; way softer than what you get in restaurants and quantity was sufficient too (8-9 huge pieces). However I’d suggest that once you open it, rather than storing it make 1-2 dishes out of it in one go.
Will definitely definitely buy again! Won’t have to buy ready made soya chaap dishes from outside anymore 😁
